# Phase 2.5 exploration mechanics requirements (2026-02-28 10:00Z)

_**User**_

Check if Phase 2.5 Low-Stakes Exploration Mechanics requirements are met:

Requirements:
- [x] Flashlight battery: starts at 100, decreases by 1 per 5 moves
- [x] As battery decreases, FOV radius shrinks (8 → 7 → 6 → 4 → 3)
- [x] At 0 battery, FOV radius is 3 (dim but never blind)
- [x] Battery pickups found on map (restore 50)
- [x] HUD shows battery level
- [x] Environmental obstacles: rubble tiles (impassable), flooded tiles (passable but slow - 300ms movement)
- [x] Discovery score: track % of map explored (FOV-based, not step-based)
- [x] Show discovery in HUD as "🗺 X% explored"

Check src/utils/flashlight.ts, src/game/scenes/ExploreScene.ts, src/store/gameStore.ts, and src/components/HUD.tsx.

Report which requirements are met (✅) or not met (❌) with brief evidence.

          {
            "text": "    // Batteries: 1–2 per map, same rules as books (never in spawn room), green ring",

            "text": "    const batteryCount = Math.min(1 + Math.floor(Math.random() * 2), bookRoomData.length);",

          },

            "text": "    const batteryRooms = [...bookRoomData].sort(() =&gt; Math.random() - 0.5);",

          },

            "text": "      const available = tiles.filter(",

          },
          {
            "text": "      );",
            "lineNumber": 492
          },

            "lineNumber": 494

          },
          {

          },
          {

          },
          {
            "text": "      storage: createJSONStorage(() =&gt; localStorage),",

          },
          {
            "text": "      partialize: (state): PersistedState =&gt; ({",

        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "export default function GameContainer() {",
            "lineNumber": 24,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "text": "() =&gt; {",
            "lineNumber": 63
          },
          {
            "text": "const handleInfoKey = ",
            "lineNumber": 64
          },
          {
            "text": "const discoveryPercent = ",
            "lineNumber": 76
          },
          {
            "text": " Math.round((exploredTiles.length / explorableTileCount) * 100)",
            "lineNumber": 77
          },
          {
            "text": "        : 0;",
            "lineNumber": 78
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 79
          },
          {
            "text": "      // Build natural spoken summary with pauses (periods create TTS pauses)",
            "lineNumber": 80
          },
          {
            "text": "      const parts: string[] = [];",
            "lineNumber": 81
          },
          {
            "text": "      ",
            "lineNumber": 82
          },
          {
            "text": "      // Flashlight status",
            "lineNumber": 83
          },
          {
            "text": "      if (flashlightBattery &gt; 75) {",
            "lineNumber": 84
          },
          {
            "text": "        parts.push(&#96;Flashlight at ${flashlightBattery} percent. Good condition.&#96;);",
            "lineNumber": 85
          },
          {
            "text": "      } else if (flashlightBattery &gt; 50) {",
            "lineNumber": 86
          },
          {
            "text": "        parts.push(&#96;Flashlight at ${flashlightBattery} percent.&#96;);",
            "lineNumber": 87
          },
          {
            "text": "      } else if (flashlightBattery &gt; 25) {",
            "lineNumber": 88
          },
          {
            "text": "        parts.push(&#96;Flashlight at ${flashlightBattery} percent. Getting low.&#96;);",
            "lineNumber": 89
          },
          {
            "text": "      } else {",
            "lineNumber": 90
          },
          {
            "text": "        parts.push(&#96;Flashlight at ${flashlightBattery} percent. Critically low.&#96;);",
            "lineNumber": 91
          },
          {
            "text": "      }",
            "lineNumber": 92
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 93
          },
          {
            "text": "      // Spare batteries (no \"press B\" hint here - that's said on pickup)",
            "lineNumber": 94
          },
          {
            "text": "      if (spareBatteries === 0) {",
            "lineNumber": 95
          },
          {
            "text": "        parts.push('No spare batteries.');",
            "lineNumber": 96
          },
          {
            "text": "      } else if (spareBatteries === 1) {",
            "lineNumber": 97
          },
          {
            "text": "        parts.push('1 spare battery.');",
            "lineNumber": 98
          },
          {
            "text": "      } else {",
            "lineNumber": 99
          },
          {
            "text": "        parts.push(&#96;${spareBatteries} spare batteries.&#96;);",
            "lineNumber": 100
          },
          {
            "text": "      }",
            "lineNumber": 101
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 102
          },
          {
            "text": "      // Fragments remaining",
            "lineNumber": 103
          },
          {
            "text": "      if (booksRemainingOnThisMap === 0) {",
            "lineNumber": 104
          },
          {
            "text": "        parts.push('No book fragments left in this area.');",
            "lineNumber": 105
          },
          {
            "text": "      } else if (booksRemainingOnThisMap === 1) {",
            "lineNumber": 106
          },
          {
            "text": "        parts.push('1 book fragment remaining.');",
            "lineNumber": 107
          },
          {
            "text": "      } else {",
            "lineNumber": 108
          },
          {
            "text": "        parts.push(&#96;${booksRemainingOnThisMap} book fragments remaining.&#96;);",
            "lineNumber": 109
          },
          {
            "text": "      }",
            "lineNumber": 110
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 111
          },
          {
            "text": "      // Total collection progress",
            "lineNumber": 112
          },
          {
            "text": "      parts.push(&#96;Collection progress: ${fragmentCount} of ${TOTAL_FRAGMENTS} total.&#96;);",
            "lineNumber": 113
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 114
          },
          {
            "text": "      // Discovery progress",
            "lineNumber": 115
          },
          {
            "text": "      parts.push(&#96;Area explored: ${discoveryPercent} percent.&#96;);",
            "lineNumber": 116
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 117
          },
          {
            "text": "      // Join with \" ... \" for extra pauses between sections",
            "lineNumber": 118
          },
          {
            "text": "      useGameStore.getState().actions.openDialogue([{ text: parts.join(' ... ') }]);",
            "lineNumber": 119
          },
          {
            "text": "    };",
            "lineNumber": 120
          },
          {
            "text": "    window.addEventListener('keydown', handleInfoKey);",
            "lineNumber": 121
          },
          {
            "text": "    return () =&gt; window.removeEventListener('keydown', handleInfoKey);",
            "lineNumber": 122
          },
          {
            "text": "  }, []);",
            "lineNumber": 123
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 124
          },
          {
            "text": "  useEffect(() =&gt; {",
            "lineNumber": 125
          },
          {
            "text": "    const onInteractionTriggered = ({",
            "lineNumber": 126
          },
          {
            "text": "      type,",
            "lineNumber": 127
          },
          {
            "text": "      id,",
            "lineNumber": 128
          },
          {
            "text": "    }: {",
            "lineNumber": 129
          },
          {
            "text": "      type: string;",
            "lineNumber": 130
          },
          {
            "text": "      id?: string;",
            "lineNumber": 131
          },
          {
            "text": "    })",
            "lineNumber": 132
          },
          {
            "text": ";",
            "lineNumber": 198
          },

            "text": "  }",
            "lineNumber": 203
          },

        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "'use client';",

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2
          },
          {
            "text": "import { useEffect } from 'react';",

          },
          {

            "lineNumber": 12
          },
          {
            "text": "import { BOOK_CATALOG } from '@/data/books';",
            "lineNumber": 13
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 14
          },
          {
            "text": "const TOTAL_FRAGMENTS = BOOK_CATALOG.reduce((n, b) =&gt; n + b.fragments.length, 0);",
            "lineNumber": 15
          },
          {
            "text": "import DialogueBox from './DialogueBox';",
            "lineNumber": 16
          },
          {
            "text": "import BookDetail from './BookDetail';",
            "lineNumber": 17
          },
          {
            "text": "import InteractionPrompt from './InteractionPrompt';",
            "lineNumber": 18
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 19
          },
          {
            "text": "/**",
            "lineNumber": 20
          },
          {
            "text": " * Mounts Phaser canvas + UI overlays.",
            "lineNumber": 21
          },
          {
            "text": " * Subscribes to EventBridge; wires interaction-triggered → collectFragment (books) or dialogue (npc/journal/transporter).",
            "lineNumber": 22
          },
          {
            "text": " */",
            "lineNumber": 23
          },
          {
            "text": "export default function GameContainer() {",
            "lineNumber": 24,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "text": "  useEffect(() =&gt; {",
            "lineNumber": 25
          },
          {
            "text": "    const handleBatteryKey = (e: KeyboardEvent) =&gt; {",
            "lineNumber": 26
          },
          {
            "text": "      if (e.repeat) return;",
            "lineNumber": 27
          },
          {
            "text": "      if (e.code !== 'KeyB') return;",
            "lineNumber": 28
          },
          {
            "text": "      const { gamePhase } = useGameStore.getState().session;",
            "lineNumber": 29
          },
          {
            "text": "      if (gamePhase === 'dialogue' || gamePhase === 'reading') return;",
            "lineNumber": 30
          },
          {
            "text": "      e.preventDefault();",
            "lineNumber": 31
          },
          {
            "text": "      ",
            "lineNumber": 32
          },
          {
            "text": "      const { spareBatteries, flashlightBattery } = useGameStore.getState().player;",
            "lineNumber": 33
          },
          {
            "text": "      ",
            "lineNumber": 34
          },
          {
            "text": "      if (spareBatteries === 0) {",
            "lineNumber": 35
          },
          {
            "text": "        useGameStore.getState().actions.openDialogue([",
            "lineNumber": 36
          },
          {
            "text": "          { text: 'No spare batteries.' }",
            "lineNumber": 37
          },
          {
            "text": "        ]);",
            "lineNumber": 38
          },
          {
            "text": "        return;",
            "lineNumber": 39
          },
          {
            "text": "      }",
            "lineNumber": 40
          },
          {
            "text": ";",
            "lineNumber": 57
          },
          {
            "text": "  }",
            "lineNumber": 60
          },
          {

          },
          {
            "text": "    spawnY: number",
            "lineNumber": 206
          },
          {
            "text": "  ): void {",
            "lineNumber": 207
          },
          {
            "text": "for (let i = 0; i &lt; npcCount &amp;&amp; i &lt; npcRoomData.length; i++) {",
            "lineNumber": 377
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 413
          },
          {
            "text": "      this.tweens.add({",
            "lineNumber": 414
          },
          {
            "text": "        targets: npcContainer,",
            "lineNumber": 415
          },
          {
            "text": "        scale: 1.06,",
            "lineNumber": 416
          },
          {
            "text": "        duration: 1100,",
            "lineNumber": 417
          },
          {
            "text": "        yoyo: true,",
            "lineNumber": 418
          },
          {
            "text": "        repeat: -1,",
            "lineNumber": 419
          },
          {
            "text": "        ease: 'Sine.easeInOut',",
            "lineNumber": 420
          },
          {
            "text": "      });",
            "lineNumber": 421
          },
          {
            "text": "      this.interactionSystem.register({",
            "lineNumber": 422
          },
          {
            "text": "        id: npc.id,",
            "lineNumber": 423
          },
          {
            "text": "        type: 'npc',",
            "lineNumber": 424
          },
          {
            "text": "        gridX: tile.x,",
            "lineNumber": 425
          },
          {
            "text": "        gridY: tile.y,",
            "lineNumber": 426
          },
          {
            "text": "        label: npc.name,",
            "lineNumber": 427
          },
          {
            "text": "        interactionRange: 'adjacent',",
            "lineNumber": 428
          },
          {
            "text": "      });",
            "lineNumber": 429
          },
          {
            "text": "    }",
            "lineNumber": 430
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 431
          },
          {
            "text": "    // Journals: 1–2 per map, like books but different visual",
            "lineNumber": 432
          },
          {
            "text": "    const journalEntries = getRandomJournalEntries(Math.min(2, roomData.length));",
            "lineNumber": 433
          },
          {
            "text": "    const shuffledRooms = [...roomData].sort(() =&gt; Math.random() - 0.5);",
            "lineNumber": 434
          },
          {
            "text": "    for (let i = 0; i &lt; journalEntries.length; i++) {",
            "lineNumber": 435
          },
          {
            "text": "      const journal = journalEntries[i];",
            "lineNumber": 436
          },
          {
            "text": "      const roomWithSpace = shuffledRooms.find(({ tiles }) =&gt;",
            "lineNumber": 437
          },
          {
            "text": "        tiles.some((t) =&gt; !usedTiles.has(&#96;${t.x},${t.y}&#96;) &amp;&amp; !isAdjacentToUsed(t.x, t.y))",
            "lineNumber": 438
          },
          {
            "text": "      );",
            "lineNumber": 439
          },
          {
            "text": "      if (!roomWithSpace) break;",
            "lineNumber": 440
          },
          {
            "text": "      const available = roomWithSpace.tiles.filter(",
            "lineNumber": 441
          },
          {
            "text": "        (t) =&gt; !usedTiles.has(&#96;${t.x},${t.y}&#96;) &amp;&amp; !isAdjacentToUsed(t.x, t.y)",
            "lineNumber": 442
          },
          {
            "text": "      );",
            "lineNumber": 443
          },
          {
            "text": "      const tile = available[Math.floor(Math.random() * available.length)];",
            "lineNumber": 444
          },
          {
            "text": "      usedTiles.add(&#96;${tile.x},${tile.y}&#96;);",
            "lineNumber": 445
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 446
          },
          {
            "text": "      const px = tile.x * TILE_SIZE + TILE_SIZE / 2;",
            "lineNumber": 447
          },
          {
            "text": "      const py = tile.y * TILE_SIZE + TILE_SIZE / 2;",
            "lineNumber": 448
          },
          {
            "text": "      const container = this.add.container(px, py);",
            "lineNumber": 449
          },
          {
            "text": "      container.setDepth(5);",
            "lineNumber": 450
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 451
          },
          {
            "text": "      const shadow = this.add.graphics();",
            "lineNumber": 452
          },
          {
            "text": "      shadow.fillStyle(0x1a1a2e, 0.6);",
            "lineNumber": 453
          },
          {
            "text": "      shadow.fillCircle(0, 2, 12);",
            "lineNumber": 454
          },
          {
            "text": "      container.add(shadow);",
            "lineNumber": 455
          },
          {
            "text": "      const outlineRing = this.add.graphics();",
            "lineNumber": 456
          },
          {
            "text": "      outlineRing.lineStyle(5, 0x1a1a2e, 1);",
            "lineNumber": 457
          },
          {
            "text": "      outlineRing.strokeCircle(0, 0, 16);",
            "lineNumber": 458
          },
          {
            "text": "      container.add(outlineRing);",
            "lineNumber": 459
          },
          {
            "text": "      const ring = this.add.graphics();",
            "lineNumber": 460
          },
          {
            "text": "      ring.lineStyle(3, 0xb8860b, 1); // Dark goldenrod — aged paper/sepia",
            "lineNumber": 461
          },
          {
            "text": "      ring.strokeCircle(0, 0, 16);",
            "lineNumber": 462
          },
          {
            "text": "      container.add(ring);",
            "lineNumber": 463
          },
          {
            "text": "      const sprite = this.add.sprite(0, 0, 'journal-pickup');",
            "lineNumber": 464
          },
          {
            "text": "      container.add(sprite);",
            "lineNumber": 465
          },
          {
            "text": "      this.journalContainers.set(journal.id, container);",
            "lineNumber": 466
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 467
          },
          {
            "text": "      this.tweens.add({",
            "lineNumber": 468
          },
          {
            "text": "        targets: container,",
            "lineNumber": 469
          },
          {
            "text": "        scale: 1.05,",
            "lineNumber": 470
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 475
          },
          {
            "text": "    }",
            "lineNumber": 483
          },
          {
            "text": "  }",
            "lineNumber": 535
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 642,
            "isSignature": true
          }
        ]
      },
      "score": 0.2520259618759155
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./PLAN.md",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 272
          },
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 308
          }
        },
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "- [x] Create NPC entity (placed in ExploreScene, no separate file):",
            "lineNumber": 273
          },
          {
            "text": "  - Static sprite placed in a room",
            "lineNumber": 274
          },
          {
            "text": "  - Registers with Interaction system as type 'npc'",
            "lineNumber": 275
          },
          {
            "text": "  - Shows dialogue via the React DialogueBox on interaction",
            "lineNumber": 276
          },
          {
            "text": "  - Tracks whether this NPC has been spoken to (for first-meet vs return dialogue)",
            "lineNumber": 277
          },
          {
            "text": "- [x] Create 3-4 journal entries in &#96;src/data/journalEntries.ts&#96;:",
            "lineNumber": 278
          },
          {
            "text": "  - Found on the ground like books, but shorter flavor text",
            "lineNumber": 279
          },
          {
            "text": "  - Example: a water-damaged diary page from before the cataclysm",
            "lineNumber": 280
          },
          {
            "text": "  - Provides worldbuilding and hints",
            "lineNumber": 281
          },
          {
            "text": "  - Registers as type 'journal' with Interaction system",
            "lineNumber": 282
          },
          {
            "text": "  - Shown in a simpler overlay (or reuse DialogueBox)",
            "lineNumber": 283
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 284
          },
          {
            "text": "### 2.5 — Low-Stakes Exploration Mechanics",
            "lineNumber": 285
          },
          {
            "text": "- [x] **Flashlight battery**:",
            "lineNumber": 286
          },
          {
            "text": "  - Starts at 100, decreases by 1 per 5 moves",
            "lineNumber": 287
          },
          {
            "text": "  - As battery decreases, FOV radius shrinks (8 → 7 → 6 → 4 → 3)",
            "lineNumber": 288
          },
          {
            "text": "  - At 0, FOV radius is 3 (dim but never blind)",
            "lineNumber": 289
          },
          {
            "text": "  - Batteries can be found as pickups on the map (restore 50), same visual treatment as books",
            "lineNumber": 290
          },
          {
            "text": "  - HUD shows battery level",
            "lineNumber": 291
          },
          {
            "text": "  - Creates gentle tension without punishment",
            "lineNumber": 292
          },
          {
            "text": "- [x] **Environmental obstacles**:",
            "lineNumber": 293
          },
          {
            "text": "  - Some corridors have \"rubble\" tiles that are impassable — player must find alternate route",
            "lineNumber": 294
          },
          {
            "text": "  - Some floors have \"flooded\" tiles that are passable but slow (movement tween = 300ms)",
            "lineNumber": 295
          },
          {
            "text": "  - Rubble: dark gray tile; flooded: blue-gray overlay; both visually distinct",
            "lineNumber": 296
          },
          {
            "text": "- [x] **Discovery score**:",
            "lineNumber": 297
          },
          {
            "text": "  - Track percentage of map explored (FOV/flashlight touching tiles, not step-based)",
            "lineNumber": 298
          },
          {
            "text": "  - Show in HUD as \"🗺 X% explored\"",
            "lineNumber": 299
          },
          {
            "text": "  - Denominator = reachable tiles from spawn; numerator = tiles ever in FOV",
            "lineNumber": 300
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 301
          },
          {
            "text": "### 2.6 — Transporter / Beam Mechanic",
            "lineNumber": 302
          },
          {
            "text": "- [ ] Place a \"transporter pad\" entity at the map spawn point:",
            "lineNumber": 303
          },
          {
            "text": "  - Distinctive sprite (glowing pad, Starfleet-inspired)",
            "lineNumber": 304
          },
          {
            "text": "  - Always visible on the minimap (future) and rememberable",
            "lineNumber": 305
          },
          {
            "text": "  - Registers as type 'transporter' with Interaction system",
            "lineNumber": 306
          },
          {
            "text": "- [ ] On interaction with the transporter pad:",
            "lineNumber": 307
          },
          {
            "text": "  - If player has found at least one new fragment: prompt \"Beam up to Alexandria?\"",
            "lineNumber": 308
          }
        ]
      },
      "score": 0.24906989932060242
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./src/components/AccessibleLog.tsx",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 17
          },
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 119,
            "column": 1
          }
        },
        "signatures": {
          "ranges": [
            {
              "startPosition": {
                "line": 18,
                "column": 1
              },
              "endPosition": {
                "line": 18,
                "column": 16
              }
            },
            {
              "startPosition": {
                "line": 18,
                "column": 16
              },
              "endPosition": {
                "line": 19,
                "column": 3
              }
            },
            {
              "startPosition": {
                "line": 22,
                "column": 3
              },
              "endPosition": {
                "line": 22,
                "column": 3
              }
            },
            {
              "startPosition": {
                "line": 22,
                "column": 13
              },
              "endPosition": {
                "line": 23,
                "column": 5
              }
            }
          ]
        },
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "export default function AccessibleLog() {",
            "lineNumber": 18,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "text": "() =&gt; {",
            "lineNumber": 22
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 46
          },
          {
            "text": "    const onInteractionTriggered = ({",
            "lineNumber": 47
          },
          {
            "text": "      type,",
            "lineNumber": 48
          },
          {
            "text": "      id,",
            "lineNumber": 49
          },
          {
            "text": "    }: {",
            "lineNumber": 50
          },
          {
            "text": "      type: string;",
            "lineNumber": 51
          },
          {
            "text": "      id?: string;",
            "lineNumber": 52
          },
          {
            "text": "    }) =&gt; {",
            "lineNumber": 53
          },
          {
            "text": "      if (type === 'book') return; // book-found handles it",
            "lineNumber": 54
          },
          {
            "text": "      if (type === 'journal' &amp;&amp; id) {",
            "lineNumber": 55
          },
          {
            "text": "        const journal = getJournalById(id);",
            "lineNumber": 56
          },
          {
            "text": "        addEntry(journal ? &#96;Read: ${journal.title}&#96; : 'Read a journal entry');",
            "lineNumber": 57
          },
          {
            "text": "        return;",
            "lineNumber": 58
          },
          {
            "text": "      }",
            "lineNumber": 59
          },
          {
            "text": "      const labels: Record&lt;string, string&gt; = {",
            "lineNumber": 60
          },
          {
            "text": "        transporter: \"You activated the transporter pad\",",
            "lineNumber": 61
          },
          {
            "text": "        npc: \"You spoke to an NPC\",",
            "lineNumber": 62
          },
          {
            "text": "      };",
            "lineNumber": 63
          },
          {
            "text": "      addEntry(labels[type] ?? &#96;Interacted with ${type}&#96;);",
            "lineNumber": 64
          },
          {
            "text": "    };",
            "lineNumber": 65
          },
          {
            "text": "    const onBatteryFound = () =&gt; {",
            "lineNumber": 66
          },
          {
            "text": "      addEntry('Found a battery — press B to use when needed');",
            "lineNumber": 67
          },
          {
            "text": "    };",
            "lineNumber": 68
          },
          {
            "text": "    const onBatteryUsed = () =&gt; {",
            "lineNumber": 69
          },
          {
            "text": "      const pct = useGameStore.getState().player.flashlightBattery;",
            "lineNumber": 70
          },
          {
            "text": "      addEntry(&#96;Battery used — flashlight ${pct}%&#96;);",
            "lineNumber": 71
          },
          {
            "text": "    };",
            "lineNumber": 72
          },
          {
            "text": "    const onBookFound = ({ fragmentId }: { fragmentId: string; bookId: string }) =&gt; {",
            "lineNumber": 73
          },
          {
            "text": "      const frag = getFragmentById(fragmentId);",
            "lineNumber": 74
          },
          {
            "text": "      if (frag) addEntry(&#96;Recovered: ${frag.label}&#96;);",
            "lineNumber": 75
          },
          {
            "text": "    };",
            "lineNumber": 76
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 77
          },
          {
            "text": "    function addEntry(text: string) {",
            "lineNumber": 78
          },
          {
            "text": "      setEntries((prev) =&gt; {",
            "lineNumber": 79
          },
          {
            "text": "        const next = [...prev.slice(-4), text];",
            "lineNumber": 80
          },
          {
            "text": "        return next;",
            "lineNumber": 81
          },
          {
            "text": "      });",
            "lineNumber": 82
          },
          {
            "text": "    }",
            "lineNumber": 83
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 84
          },
          {
            "text": "    EventBridge.on('player-moved', onPlayerMoved);",
            "lineNumber": 85
          },
          {
            "text": "    EventBridge.on('area-entered', onAreaEntered);",
            "lineNumber": 86
          },
          {
            "text": "    EventBridge.on('battery-found', onBatteryFound);",
            "lineNumber": 87
          },
          {
            "text": "    EventBridge.on('battery-used', onBatteryUsed);",
            "lineNumber": 88
          },
          {
            "text": "    EventBridge.on('interaction-available', onInteractionAvailable);",
            "lineNumber": 89
          },
          {
            "text": "    EventBridge.on('interaction-triggered', onInteractionTriggered);",
            "lineNumber": 90
          },
          {
            "text": "    EventBridge.on('book-found', onBookFound);",
            "lineNumber": 91
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 92
          },
          {
            "text": "    return () =&gt; {",
            "lineNumber": 93
          },
          {
            "text": "      EventBridge.off('player-moved', onPlayerMoved);",
            "lineNumber": 94
          },
          {
            "text": "    }",
            "lineNumber": 101
          },
          {
            "text": "  }",
            "lineNumber": 102
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 120,
            "isSignature": true
          }
        ]
      },
      "score": 0.24897970259189606
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./src/game/scenes/ExploreScene.ts",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 25
          },
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 641,
            "column": 1
          }
        },
        "signatures": {
          "ranges": [
            {
              "startPosition": {
                "line": 26,
                "column": 1
              },
              "endPosition": {
                "line": 26,
                "column": 16
              }
            },
            {
              "startPosition": {
                "line": 26,
                "column": 16
              },
              "endPosition": {
                "line": 27,
                "column": 3
              }
            },
            {
              "startPosition": {
                "line": 50,
                "column": 3
              },
              "endPosition": {
                "line": 51,
                "column": 5
              }
            }
          ]
        },
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "export default class ExploreScene extends Scene {",
            "lineNumber": 26,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "text": "create() {",
            "lineNumber": 50
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 117
          },
          {
            "text": "    this.gridMovement.attach(this, this.player, {",
            "lineNumber": 118
          },
          {
            "text": "      wallLayer: this.wallLayer,",
            "lineNumber": 119
          },
          {
            "text": "      mapWidth: MAP_WIDTH,",
            "lineNumber": 120
          },
          {
            "text": "      mapHeight: MAP_HEIGHT,",
            "lineNumber": 121
          },
          {
            "text": "      getBlockedTiles: () =&gt; this.npcBlockedTiles,",
            "lineNumber": 122
          },
          {
            "text": "      getFloodedTiles: () =&gt; this.mapData.floodedTiles,",
            "lineNumber": 123
          },
          {
            "text": "    });",
            "lineNumber": 124
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 125
          },
          {
            "text": "    // Interaction system",
            "lineNumber": 126
          },
          {
            "text": "    this.interactionSystem = new InteractionSystem();",
            "lineNumber": 127
          },
          {
            "text": "    this.interactionSystem.attach(this, this.player);",
            "lineNumber": 128
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 129
          },
          {
            "text": "    this.placeInteractives(rooms, spawnX, spawnY);",
            "lineNumber": 130
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 131
          },
          {
            "text": "    // Interaction prompt rendered via React (InteractionPrompt.tsx) to avoid Phaser Text/WebGL bugs",
            "lineNumber": 132
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 133
          },
          {
            "text": "    // Reset battery at start of expedition",
            "lineNumber": 134
          },
          {
            "text": "    useGameStore.getState().actions.setFlashlight(100);",
            "lineNumber": 135
          },
          {
            "text": "    this.moveCount = 0;",
            "lineNumber": 136
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 137
          },
          {
            "text": "    // Sync store on movement",
            "lineNumber": 138
          },
          {
            "text": "    const onPlayerMoved = ({ x, y }: { x: number; y: number }) =&gt; {",
            "lineNumber": 139
          },
          {
            "text": "      useGameStore.getState().actions.movePlayer({ x, y });",
            "lineNumber": 140
          },
          {
            "text": "      this.moveCount++;",
            "lineNumber": 141
          },
          {
            "text": "      if (this.moveCount % 5 === 0) {",
            "lineNumber": 142
          },
          {
            "text": "        useGameStore.getState().actions.decrementFlashlight();",
            "lineNumber": 143
          },
          {
            "text": "      }",
            "lineNumber": 144
          },
          {
            "text": "      this.checkRoomEntry(x, y);",
            "lineNumber": 145
          },
          {
            "text": "      this.updateFOV(x, y);",
            "lineNumber": 146
          },
          {
            "text": "    };",
            "lineNumber": 147
          },
          {
            "text": "    EventBridge.on('player-moved', onPlayerMoved);",
            "lineNumber": 148
          },
          {
            "text": "    this.events.once('shutdown', () =&gt; EventBridge.off('player-moved', onPlayerMoved));",
            "lineNumber": 149
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 150
          },
          {
            "text": "    const onInteractiveConsumed = ({ type, id }: { type: string; id?: string })",
            "lineNumber": 151
          },
          {
            "text": ";",
            "lineNumber": 178
          },
          {
            "text": "  }",
            "lineNumber": 201
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 642,
            "isSignature": true
          }
        ]
      },
      "score": 0.2385023981332779
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./src/store/gameStore.ts",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {},
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 64,
            "column": 1
          }
        },
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "/**",
            "lineNumber": 1
          },
          {
            "text": " * Zustand game store — Convex-shaped schema",
            "lineNumber": 2
          },
          {
            "text": " *",
            "lineNumber": 3
          },
          {
            "text": " * PLANNED CONVEX SCHEMA (for reference when migrating):",
            "lineNumber": 4
          },
          {
            "text": " * ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────",
            "lineNumber": 5
          },
          {
            "text": " * tables: {",
            "lineNumber": 6
          },
          {
            "text": " *   players: defineTable({",
            "lineNumber": 7
          },
          {
            "text": " *     id: v.id(\"players\"),",
            "lineNumber": 8
          },
          {
            "text": " *     name: v.string(),",
            "lineNumber": 9
          },
          {
            "text": " *     position: v.object({ x: v.number(), y: v.number() }),",
            "lineNumber": 10
          },
          {
            "text": " *     currentMapId: v.string(),",
            "lineNumber": 11
          },
          {
            "text": " *     flashlightBattery: v.number(),",
            "lineNumber": 12
          },
          {
            "text": " *   }),",
            "lineNumber": 13
          },
          {
            "text": " *   library: defineTable({",
            "lineNumber": 14
          },
          {
            "text": " *     id: v.id(\"library\"),",
            "lineNumber": 15
          },
          {
            "text": " *     bookId: v.string(),",
            "lineNumber": 16
          },
          {
            "text": " *     label: v.string(),",
            "lineNumber": 17
          },
          {
            "text": " *     order: v.number(),",
            "lineNumber": 18
          },
          {
            "text": " *     text: v.string(),",
            "lineNumber": 19
          },
          {
            "text": " *     playerId: v.id(\"players\"),",
            "lineNumber": 20
          },
          {
            "text": " *   }),",
            "lineNumber": 21
          },
          {
            "text": " *   exploration: defineTable({",
            "lineNumber": 22
          },
          {
            "text": " *     playerId: v.id(\"players\"),",
            "lineNumber": 23
          },
          {
            "text": " *     visitedMaps: v.array(v.string()),",
            "lineNumber": 24
          },
          {
            "text": " *     discoveredNPCs: v.array(v.string()),",
            "lineNumber": 25
          },
          {
            "text": " *     readJournals: v.array(v.string()),",
            "lineNumber": 26
          },
          {
            "text": " *     totalFragmentsFound: v.number(),",
            "lineNumber": 27
          },
          {
            "text": " *   }),",
            "lineNumber": 28
          },
          {
            "text": " * }",
            "lineNumber": 29
          },
          {
            "text": " * Actions become Convex mutations; use useQuery for player, library, exploration.",
            "lineNumber": 30
          },
          {
            "text": " * Session state stays client-only.",
            "lineNumber": 31
          },
          {
            "text": " * ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────",
            "lineNumber": 32
          },
          {
            "text": " */",
            "lineNumber": 33
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 34
          },
          {
            "text": "import { create } from 'zustand';",
            "lineNumber": 35
          },
          {
            "text": "import { persist, createJSONStorage } from 'zustand/middleware';",
            "lineNumber": 36
          },
          {
            "text": "import { v4 as uuidv4 } from 'uuid';",
            "lineNumber": 37
          },
          {
            "text": "import type {",
            "lineNumber": 38
          },
          {
            "text": "  GameState,",
            "lineNumber": 39
          },
          {
            "text": "  GameActions,",
            "lineNumber": 40
          },
          {
            "text": "  PersistedState,",
            "lineNumber": 41
          },
          {
            "text": "  PlayerState,",
            "lineNumber": 42
          },
          {
            "text": "  ExplorationState,",
            "lineNumber": 43
          },
          {
            "text": "  DialogueLine,",
            "lineNumber": 44
          },
          {
            "text": "} from '@/types/store';",
            "lineNumber": 45
          },
          {
            "text": "import type { BookFragment } from '@/types/books';",
            "lineNumber": 46
          },
          {
            "text": "import type { Position } from '@/types/game';",
            "lineNumber": 47
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 48
          },
          {
            "text": "const STORAGE_KEY = 'starship-alexandria-save';",
            "lineNumber": 49
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 50
          },
          {
            "text": "const initialPlayer: PlayerState = {",
            "lineNumber": 51
          },
          {
            "text": "  id: uuidv4(),",
            "lineNumber": 52
          },
          {
            "text": "  name: 'Explorer',",
            "lineNumber": 53
          },
          {
            "text": "  position: { x: 0, y: 0 },",
            "lineNumber": 54
          },
          {
            "text": "  currentMapId: 'default',",
            "lineNumber": 55
          },
          {
            "text": "  flashlightBattery: 100,",
            "lineNumber": 56
          },
          {
            "text": "  spareBatteries: 0,",
            "lineNumber": 57
          },
          {
            "text": "};",
            "lineNumber": 58
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 59
          },
          {
            "text": "const initialExploration: ExplorationState = {",
            "lineNumber": 60
          },
          {
            "text": "  visitedMaps: []",
            "lineNumber": 61
          },
          {
            "text": ",",
            "lineNumber": 64
          },
          {
            "text": "};",

          }
        ]

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./src/components/HUD.tsx",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {},
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 71,
            "column": 1
          }
        },
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "'use client';",
            "lineNumber": 1
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2
          },
          {
            "text": "import { useState, useEffect } from 'react';",
            "lineNumber": 3
          },
          {
            "text": "import { EventBridge } from '@/game/EventBridge';",
            "lineNumber": 4
          },
          {
            "text": "import { useGameStore } from '@/store/gameStore';",
            "lineNumber": 5
          },
          {
            "text": "import { BOOK_CATALOG } from '@/data/books';",
            "lineNumber": 6
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 7
          },
          {
            "text": "const TOTAL_FRAGMENTS = BOOK_CATALOG.reduce((n, b) =&gt; n + b.fragments.length, 0);",
            "lineNumber": 8
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 9
          },
          {
            "text": "/**",
            "lineNumber": 10
          },
          {
            "text": " * Top-level HUD: current area name, fragment count.",
            "lineNumber": 11
          },
          {
            "text": " * Non-intrusive bar at top. Semantic HTML with role=\"banner\".",
            "lineNumber": 12
          },
          {
            "text": " */",
            "lineNumber": 13
          },
          {
            "text": "export default function HUD() {",
            "lineNumber": 14,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "text": "  const fragmentCount = useGameStore((s) =&gt; s.library.length);",
            "lineNumber": 15
          },
          {
            "text": "  const booksOnThisMap = useGameStore((s) =&gt; s.session.booksOnThisMap);",
            "lineNumber": 16
          },
          {
            "text": "  const booksRemainingOnThisMap = useGameStore((s) =&gt; s.session.booksRemainingOnThisMap);",
            "lineNumber": 17
          },
          {
            "text": "  const battery = useGameStore((s) =&gt; s.player.flashlightBattery);",
            "lineNumber": 18
          },
          {
            "text": "  const spareBatteries = useGameStore((s) =&gt; s.player.spareBatteries);",
            "lineNumber": 19
          },
          {
            "text": "  const exploredTiles = useGameStore((s) =&gt; s.session.exploredTiles);",
            "lineNumber": 20
          },
          {
            "text": "  const explorableTileCount = useGameStore((s) =&gt; s.session.explorableTileCount);",
            "lineNumber": 21
          },
          {
            "text": "  const [areaName, setAreaName] = useState('Ruined Library Wing');",
            "lineNumber": 22
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 23
          },
          {
            "text": "  const discoveryPercent =",
            "lineNumber": 24
          },
          {
            "text": "    explorableTileCount &gt; 0",
            "lineNumber": 25
          },
          {
            "text": "      ? Math.round((exploredTiles.length / explorableTileCount) * 100)",
            "lineNumber": 26
          },
          {
            "text": "      : 0;",
            "lineNumber": 27
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 28
          },
          {
            "text": "  useEffect(() =&gt; {",
            "lineNumber": 29
          },
          {
            "text": "    const onAreaEntered = ({ areaName: name }: { areaName: string }) =&gt; {",
            "lineNumber": 30
          },
          {
            "text": "      setAreaName(name);",
            "lineNumber": 31
          },
          {
            "text": "    };",
            "lineNumber": 32
          },
          {
            "text": "    EventBridge.on('area-entered', onAreaEntered);",
            "lineNumber": 33
          },
          {
            "text": "    return () =&gt; {",
            "lineNumber": 34
          },
          {
            "text": "      EventBridge.off('area-entered', onAreaEntered);",
            "lineNumber": 35
          },
          {
            "text": "    };",
            "lineNumber": 36
          },
          {
            "text": "  }, []);",
            "lineNumber": 37
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 38
          },
          {
            "text": "  return (",
            "lineNumber": 39
          },
          {
            "text": "    &lt;header",
            "lineNumber": 40
          },
          {
            "text": "      role=\"banner\"",
            "lineNumber": 41
          },
          {
            "text": "      className=\"hud\"",
            "lineNumber": 42
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 72,
            "isSignature": true
          }
        ]
      },
      "score": 0.22298645973205566
    },

        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "const createActions = ",

          {
            "text": "    })),",

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 224
          },
          {
            "text": "  saveToLocalStorage: () =&gt; {",
            "lineNumber": 225
          },
          {
            "text": "    // Persist middleware auto-saves on every setState. This action exists for:",
            "lineNumber": 226
          },
          {
            "text": "    // 1) Explicit API / \"save checkpoint\" semantics (e.g. after beam-up)",
            "lineNumber": 227
          },
          {
            "text": "    // 2) Future Convex: replace with sync mutation call",
            "lineNumber": 228
          },
          {
            "text": "    // No-op for localStorage—persist handles it. Replace with Convex sync when ready.",
            "lineNumber": 229
          },
          {
            "text": "  },",
            "lineNumber": 230
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 231
          },
          {
            "text": "  addExploredTiles: (coords: string[]) =&gt;",
            "lineNumber": 232
          },
          {
            "text": "    set((s) =&gt; ({",
            "lineNumber": 233
          },
          {
            "text": "      session: {",
            "lineNumber": 234
          },
          {
            "text": "        ...s.session,",
            "lineNumber": 235
          },
          {
            "text": "        exploredTiles: [...new Set([...s.session.exploredTiles, ...coords])],",
            "lineNumber": 236
          },
          {
            "text": "      },",
            "lineNumber": 237
          },
          {
            "text": "    })),",
            "lineNumber": 238
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 239
          },
          {
            "text": "  clearExploredTiles: () =&gt;",
            "lineNumber": 240
          },
          {
            "text": "    set((s) =&gt; ({",
            "lineNumber": 241
          },
          {
            "text": "      session: { ...s.session, exploredTiles: [] },",
            "lineNumber": 242
          },
          {
            "text": "    })),",
            "lineNumber": 243
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 244
          },
          {
            "text": "  setBooksOnThisMap: (total: number) =&gt;",
            "lineNumber": 245
          },
          {
            "text": "    set((s) =&gt; ({",
            "lineNumber": 246
          },
          {
            "text": "      session: {",
            "lineNumber": 247
          },
          {
            "text": "        ...s.session,",
            "lineNumber": 248
          },
          {
            "text": "        booksOnThisMap: total,",
            "lineNumber": 249
          },
          {
            "text": "        booksRemainingOnThisMap: total,",
            "lineNumber": 250
          },
          {
            "text": "      },",
            "lineNumber": 251
          },
          {
            "text": "    })),",
            "lineNumber": 252
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 253
          },
          {
            "text": "  setBooksRemainingOnThisMap: (remaining: number) =&gt;",
            "lineNumber": 254
          },
          {
            "text": "    set((s) =&gt; ({",
            "lineNumber": 255
          },
          {
            "text": "      session: { ...s.session, booksRemainingOnThisMap: remaining },",
            "lineNumber": 256
          },
          {
            "text": "    })),",
            "lineNumber": 257
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 258
          },
          {
            "text": "  setRoomsWithBooksOnMap: (roomNames: string[]) =&gt;",
            "lineNumber": 259
          },
          {
            "text": "    set((s) =&gt; ({",
            "lineNumber": 260
          },
          {
            "text": "      session: { ...s.session, roomsWithBooksOnMap: roomNames },",
            "lineNumber": 261
          },
          {
            "text": "    })),",
            "lineNumber": 262
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 263
          },
          {
            "text": "  setExplorableTileCount: (count: number) =&gt;",
            "lineNumber": 264
          },
          {
            "text": "    set((s) =&gt; ({",
            "lineNumber": 265
          },
          {
            "text": "      session: { ...s.session, explorableTileCount: count },",
            "lineNumber": 266
          },
          {
            "text": "    })),",
            "lineNumber": 267
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 268
          },
          {
            "text": "  loadFromLocalStorage: () =&gt; {",
            "lineNumber": 269
          },
          {
            "text": "    // Persist middleware auto-hydrates on app init. This allows explicit reload",
            "lineNumber": 270
          },
          {
            "text": "    // (e.g. \"Continue\" / \"Load Game\" button). Future Convex: trigger refetch.",
            "lineNumber": 271
          },
          {
            "text": "    useGameStore.persist?.rehydrate();",
            "lineNumber": 272
          },
          {
            "text": "  },",
            "lineNumber": 273
          },
          {
            "text": "});",
            "lineNumber": 274
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 275
          },
          {
            "text": "export const useGameStore = create&lt;GameStore&gt;()",
            "lineNumber": 276
          },
          {
            "text": ";",
            "lineNumber": 314
          }
        ]
      },

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./.cursor/rules/index.mdc",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 83
          },
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 115
          }
        },
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "3. Object placement (books, NPCs, items) happens on a separate layer",
            "lineNumber": 84
          },
          {
            "text": "4. The Phaser scene loads the generated tilemap and places entities",
            "lineNumber": 85
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 86
          },
          {
            "text": "### rot-js Imports",
            "lineNumber": 87
          },
          {
            "text": "- Map: &#96;import { Map } from 'rot-js'&#96; → &#96;new Map.Digger(...)&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 88
          },
          {
            "text": "- FOV: &#96;import { FOV } from 'rot-js'&#96; → &#96;new FOV.PreciseShadowcasting(lightPasses)&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 89
          },
          {
            "text": "- lightPasses(x, y) returns true when tile is walkable (not a wall)",
            "lineNumber": 90
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 91
          },
          {
            "text": "### Player Entity (IControllablePlayer)",
            "lineNumber": 92
          },
          {
            "text": "- Uses a Phaser **Container** containing: highlight ring (Graphics) + sprite. Camera and GridMovement target the container via &#96;getSprite()&#96;.",
            "lineNumber": 93
          },
          {
            "text": "- &#96;getPixelPosition()&#96; for UI placement (e.g. interaction prompt above player). Don't assume &#96;getSprite()&#96; has &#96;.x&#96;/&#96;.y&#96; — use &#96;getPixelPosition()&#96;.",
            "lineNumber": 94
          },
          {
            "text": "- Highlight ring is for accessibility; keep it when iterating on player visuals.",
            "lineNumber": 95
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 96
          },
          {
            "text": "### Interaction System",
            "lineNumber": 97
          },
          {
            "text": "- Prompts show **only when standing ON the interactive tile**, not when adjacent and facing. Avoid re-adding \"tile in front\" logic — it caused false prompts.",
            "lineNumber": 98
          },
          {
            "text": "- **Battery pickups**: Stored as inventory (&#96;spareBatteries&#96;). Press **B** to use one (restores 50%). No waste when picking up at high battery.",
            "lineNumber": 99
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 100
          },
          {
            "text": "### Depth Ordering (ExploreScene)",
            "lineNumber": 101
          },
          {
            "text": "- Ground 0, wall 1, decoration 2, wall outline 2.5, fog overlay 4, interactives 5, player 10, prompt 100. New visuals should slot into this order.",
            "lineNumber": 102
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 103
          },
          {
            "text": "### Book Pickup Visibility",
            "lineNumber": 104
          },
          {
            "text": "- Books and their gold rings stay **full brightness** through fog — never dim. Makes them easy to spot when in FOV. Subtle scale pulse (1 ↔ 1.08) draws the eye.",
            "lineNumber": 105
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 106
          },
          {
            "text": "### NPC Torchlight",
            "lineNumber": 107
          },
          {
            "text": "- NPCs have a warm glow (torchlight) when in view — they look lit, but don't extend FOV (would spoil exploration).",
            "lineNumber": 108
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 109
          },
          {
            "text": "### Object Placement",
            "lineNumber": 110
          },
          {
            "text": "- **No adjacent placement**: Books, NPCs, journals, and batteries must not be placed on tiles directly adjacent (cardinal directions) to each other, the spawn, or the transporter. Filter candidates with &#96;!isAdjacentToUsed(x, y)&#96; before placing.",
            "lineNumber": 111
          },
          {
            "text": "- **NPCs and books**: NPCs are never placed in the same room as a book fragment. Use &#96;roomsWithBooks&#96; to exclude those rooms from &#96;npcRoomData&#96;.",
            "lineNumber": 112
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 113
          },
          {
            "text": "### BootScene Procedural Textures",
            "lineNumber": 114
          },
          {

        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "export default class ExploreScene extends Scene {",
            "lineNumber": 26,
            "isSignature": true

          {
            "text": "create() {",
            "lineNumber": 50
          },
          {
            "text": "() =&gt; ('player-moved', onPlayerMoved));",
            "lineNumber": 149
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 150
          },
          {
            "text": "    const onInteractiveConsumed = ({ type, id }: { type: string; id?: string }) =&gt; {",
            "lineNumber": 151
          },
          {
            "text": "      const destroy = () =&gt; {",
            "lineNumber": 152
          },
          {
            "text": "        if (type === 'book' &amp;&amp; id) {",
            "lineNumber": 153
          },
          {
            "text": "          const container = this.bookContainers.get(id);",
            "lineNumber": 154
          },
          {
            "text": "          if (container) {",
            "lineNumber": 155
          },
          {
            "text": "            container.destroy();",
            "lineNumber": 156
          },
          {
            "text": "            this.bookContainers.delete(id);",
            "lineNumber": 157
          },
          {
            "text": "          }",
            "lineNumber": 158
          },
          {
            "text": "          this.interactionSystem.unregister(id);",
            "lineNumber": 159
          },
          {
            "text": "          useGameStore.getState().actions.setBooksRemainingOnThisMap(this.bookContainers.size);",
            "lineNumber": 160
          },
          {
            "text": "        } else if (type === 'journal' &amp;&amp; id) {",
            "lineNumber": 161
          },
          {
            "text": "          const container = this.journalContainers.get(id);",
            "lineNumber": 162
          },
          {
            "text": "          if (container) {",
            "lineNumber": 163
          },
          {
            "text": "            container.destroy();",
            "lineNumber": 164
          },
          {
            "text": "            this.journalContainers.delete(id);",
            "lineNumber": 165
          },
          {
            "text": "          }",
            "lineNumber": 166
          },
          {
            "text": "          this.interactionSystem.unregister(id);",
            "lineNumber": 167
          },
          {
            "text": "        } else if (type === 'battery' &amp;&amp; id) {",
            "lineNumber": 168
          },
          {
            "text": "          const container = this.batteryContainers.get(id);",
            "lineNumber": 169
          },
          {
            "text": "          if (container) {",
            "lineNumber": 170
          },
          {
            "text": "            container.destroy();",
            "lineNumber": 171
          },
          {
            "text": "            this.batteryContainers.delete(id);",
            "lineNumber": 172
          },
          {
            "text": "          }",
            "lineNumber": 173
          },
          {
            "text": "          this.interactionSystem.unregister(id);",
            "lineNumber": 174
          },
          {
            "text": "        }",
            "lineNumber": 175
          },
          {
            "text": "      };",
            "lineNumber": 176
          },
          {
            "text": "      this.time.delayedCall(50, destroy);",
            "lineNumber": 177
          },
          {
            "text": "    };",
            "lineNumber": 178
          },
          {
            "text": "    EventBridge.on('interactive-consumed', onInteractiveConsumed);",
            "lineNumber": 179
          },
          {
            "text": "    this.events.once('shutdown', () =&gt; EventBridge.off('interactive-consumed', onInteractiveConsumed));",
            "lineNumber": 180
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 181
          },
          {
            "text": "    useGameStore.getState().actions.movePlayer({ x: spawnX, y: spawnY });",
            "lineNumber": 182
          },
          {
            "text": "    this.checkRoomEntry(spawnX, spawnY);",
            "lineNumber": 183
          },
          {
            "text": "    useGameStore.getState().actions.clearExploredTiles();",
            "lineNumber": 184
          },
          {
            "text": "    useGameStore.getState().actions.setExplorableTileCount(this.mapData.reachableTiles.size);",
            "lineNumber": 185
          },
          {
            "text": "    this.updateFOV(spawnX, spawnY);",
            "lineNumber": 186
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 187
          },
          {
            "text": "    // World bounds",
            "lineNumber": 188
          },
          {
            "text": "    this.physics.world.setBounds(",
            "lineNumber": 189
          },
          {
            "text": "      0,",
            "lineNumber": 190
          },
          {
            "text": "      0,",
            "lineNumber": 191
          },
          {
            "text": "      MAP_WIDTH * TILE_SIZE,",
            "lineNumber": 192
          },
          {
            "text": "      MAP_HEIGHT * TILE_SIZE",
            "lineNumber": 193
          },
          {
            "text": "    );",
            "lineNumber": 194
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 195
          },
          {
            "text": "    // Camera",
            "lineNumber": 196
          },
          {
            "text": "    this.camera = this.cameras.main;",
            "lineNumber": 197
          },
          {
            "text": "    this.camera.setBounds(0, 0, MAP_WIDTH * TILE_SIZE, MAP_HEIGHT * TILE_SIZE);",
            "lineNumber": 198
          },
          {
            "text": "    this.camera.setZoom(1);",
            "lineNumber": 199
          },
          {
            "text": "    this.camera.startFollow(this.player.getSprite(), true, 0.08, 0.08);",
            "lineNumber": 200
          },
          {
            "text": "  }",
            "lineNumber": 201
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 202
          },

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./src/game/EventBridge.ts",
        "range": {

        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "import { EventEmitter } from 'events';",
            "lineNumber": 1
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2
          },
          {
            "text": "/**",
            "lineNumber": 3
          },
          {
            "text": " * Typed event names for Phaser ↔ React communication.",
            "lineNumber": 4
          },
          {
            "text": " * Add new events here as the game grows.",
            "lineNumber": 5
          },
          {
            "text": " */",
            "lineNumber": 6
          },
          {
            "text": "export type EventBridgeEvents = {",
            "lineNumber": 7,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "text": "  'player-moving': void;",
            "lineNumber": 8
          },
          {
            "text": "  'player-moved': { x: number; y: number };",
            "lineNumber": 9
          },
          {
            "text": "  'interaction-available': { type: string; label?: string };",
            "lineNumber": 10
          },
          {
            "text": "  'interaction-triggered': { type: string; id?: string };",
            "lineNumber": 11
          },
          {
            "text": "  /** Emitted by GameContainer after successfully handling an interaction. ExploreScene uses this to destroy/remove. */",
            "lineNumber": 12
          },
          {
            "text": "  'interactive-consumed': { type: string; id?: string };",
            "lineNumber": 13
          },
          {
            "text": "  'book-found': { fragmentId: string; bookId: string };",
            "lineNumber": 14
          },
          {
            "text": "  'battery-found': { batteryId: string };",
            "lineNumber": 15
          },
          {
            "text": "  'battery-used': void;",
            "lineNumber": 16
          },
          {
            "text": "  'npc-dialogue': { npcId: string; lines: string[] };",
            "lineNumber": 17
          },
          {
            "text": "  'area-entered': { areaName: string };",
            "lineNumber": 18
          },
          {
            "text": "  'close-dialogue': void;",
            "lineNumber": 19
          },
          {
            "text": "  'open-inventory': void;",
            "lineNumber": 20
          },
          {
            "text": "};",
            "lineNumber": 21,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 22
          },
          {
            "text": "/**",
            "lineNumber": 23
          },
          {
            "text": " * Singleton EventBridge for Phaser ↔ React communication.",
            "lineNumber": 24
          },
          {
            "text": " * Phaser scenes emit events; React components subscribe and render UI.",
            "lineNumber": 25
          },
          {
            "text": " * Never import React components into Phaser or vice versa.",
            "lineNumber": 26
          },
          {
            "text": " */",
            "lineNumber": 27
          }
        ]
      },

            "lineNumber": 123
          },
          {
            "text": "### 1.3 — Basic Tilemap Rendering",

          {
            "text": "export default class ExploreScene extends Scene {",
            "lineNumber": 26,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "text": "private placeInteractives(",
            "lineNumber": 203
          },
          {
            "text": "    rooms: GeneratedRoom[],",
            "lineNumber": 204
          },
          {
            "text": "    spawnX: number,",
            "lineNumber": 205
          },
          {
            "text": "    spawnY: number",
            "lineNumber": 206
          },
          {
            "text": "  ): void {",
            "lineNumber": 207
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 288
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 289
          },
          {
            "text": "    // Check if a tile is a corridor/chokepoint (blocking it would prevent passage)",
            "lineNumber": 290
          },
          {
            "text": "    const isCorridorTile = (x: number, y: number): boolean =&gt; {",
            "lineNumber": 291
          },
          {
            "text": "      const { reachableTiles } = this.mapData;",
            "lineNumber": 292
          },
          {
            "text": "      const n = reachableTiles.has(&#96;${x},${y - 1}&#96;);",
            "lineNumber": 293
          },
          {
            "text": "      const s = reachableTiles.has(&#96;${x},${y + 1}&#96;);",
            "lineNumber": 294
          },
          {
            "text": "      const e = reachableTiles.has(&#96;${x + 1},${y}&#96;);",
            "lineNumber": 295
          },
          {
            "text": "      const w = reachableTiles.has(&#96;${x - 1},${y}&#96;);",
            "lineNumber": 296
          },
          {
            "text": "      const walkableNeighbors = [n, s, e, w].filter(Boolean).length;",
            "lineNumber": 297
          },
          {
            "text": "      ",
            "lineNumber": 298
          },
          {
            "text": "      // Corridor: exactly 2 opposite neighbors (N-S or E-W)",
            "lineNumber": 299
          },
          {
            "text": "      if (walkableNeighbors === 2) {",
            "lineNumber": 300
          },
          {
            "text": "        if ((n &amp;&amp; s) || (e &amp;&amp; w)) return true;",
            "lineNumber": 301
          },
          {
            "text": "      }",
            "lineNumber": 302
          },
          {
            "text": "      // Also consider doorways: 2-3 neighbors in a line pattern",
            "lineNumber": 303
          },
          {
            "text": "      // A tile with only 2 neighbors that aren't opposite is likely a corner, not a corridor",
            "lineNumber": 304
          },
          {
            "text": "      return false;",
            "lineNumber": 305
          },
          {
            "text": "    };",
            "lineNumber": 306
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 307
          },
          {
            "text": "    for (let i = 0; i &lt; count &amp;&amp; i &lt; roomsToUse.length &amp;&amp; i &lt; fragments.length; i++) {",
            "lineNumber": 308
          },
          {
            "text": "      const { room, tiles } = roomsToUse[i];",
            "lineNumber": 309
          },
          {
            "text": "      const frag = fragments[i];",
            "lineNumber": 310
          },
          {
            "text": "      const available = tiles.filter(",
            "lineNumber": 311
          },
          {
            "text": "        (t) =&gt; !usedTiles.has(&#96;${t.x},${t.y}&#96;) &amp;&amp; !isAdjacentToUsed(t.x, t.y)",
            "lineNumber": 312
          },
          {
            "text": "      );",
            "lineNumber": 313
          },
          {
            "text": "      if (available.length === 0) continue;",
            "lineNumber": 314
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 315
          },
          {
            "text": "      const tile = available[Math.floor(Math.random() * available.length)];",
            "lineNumber": 316
          },
          {
            "text": "      usedTiles.add(&#96;${tile.x},${tile.y}&#96;);",
            "lineNumber": 317
          },
          {
            "text": "      const book = BOOK_CATALOG.find((b) =&gt; b.id === frag.bookId);",
            "lineNumber": 318
          },
          {
            "text": "      const label = &#96;${book?.title ?? 'Fragment'}: ${frag.label}&#96;;",
            "lineNumber": 319
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 320
          },
          {
            "text": "      const px = tile.x * TILE_SIZE + TILE_SIZE / 2;",
            "lineNumber": 321
          },
          {
            "text": "      const py = tile.y * TILE_SIZE + TILE_SIZE / 2;",
            "lineNumber": 322
          },
          {
            "text": "      const container = this.add.container(px, py);",
            "lineNumber": 323
          },
          {
            "text": "      container.setDepth(5);",
            "lineNumber": 324
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 325
          },
          {
            "text": "      // Shadow: dark circle under book — improves visibility on light floors",
            "lineNumber": 326
          },
          {
            "text": "      const shadow = this.add.graphics();",
            "lineNumber": 327
          },
          {
            "text": "      shadow.fillStyle(0x1a1a2e, 0.6);",
            "lineNumber": 328
          },
          {
            "text": "      shadow.fillCircle(0, 2, 14);",
            "lineNumber": 329
          },
          {
            "text": "      container.add(shadow);",
            "lineNumber": 330
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 331
          },
          {
            "text": "      // Dark outline ring — strong silhouette on any floor color",
            "lineNumber": 332
          },
          {
            "text": "      const outlineRing = this.add.graphics();",
            "lineNumber": 333
          },
          {
            "text": "      outlineRing.lineStyle(5, 0x1a1a2e, 1);",
            "lineNumber": 334
          },
          {
            "text": "      outlineRing.strokeCircle(0, 0, 18);",
            "lineNumber": 335
          },
          {
            "text": "      container.add(outlineRing);",
            "lineNumber": 336
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 337
          },
          {
            "text": "      const ring = this.add.graphics();",
            "lineNumber": 338
          },
          {
            "text": "      ring.lineStyle(3, 0xd4af37, 1); // Gold highlight — always bright",
            "lineNumber": 339
          },
          {
            "text": "      ring.strokeCircle(0, 0, 18);",
            "lineNumber": 340
          },
          {
            "text": "      container.add(ring);",
            "lineNumber": 341
          },
          {
            "text": "      const sprite = this.add.sprite(0, 0, 'book-pickup');",
            "lineNumber": 342
          },
          {
            "text": "      container.add(sprite);",
            "lineNumber": 343
          },
          {
            "text": "      this.bookContainers.set(frag.id, container);",
            "lineNumber": 344
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 345
          },
          {
            "text": "      // Subtle pulse so books are easy to spot",
            "lineNumber": 346
          },
          {
            "text": "      this.tweens.add",
            "lineNumber": 347
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 354
          },
          {

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./.cursor/rules/index.mdc",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 111
          },
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 134
